validation_queries.description: Check for SDMA usage PMC info (device_sdma_usage)
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE name = 'device_sdma_usage'

validation_queries.description: Check for SdmaUsage symbol in amd-smi metrics
validation_queries.error_message: SdmaUsage symbol not found in amd-smi PMC info
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} WHERE symbol LIKE '%SdmaUsage%' OR name = 'device_sdma_usage'

validation_queries.description: Check for SDMA usage counter events in trace
validation_queries.error_message: Insufficient device_sdma_usage PMC events in rocpd_pmc_event
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM {table_name} event JOIN rocpd_info_pmc info ON event.pmc_id = info.id WHERE info.name = 'device_sdma_usage'
